title: Integrated Intermediate Modeling Capstone · Worked Case: Candidate Comparison
summary: Build a decision model from messy requirements, data, constraints, and alternatives. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int candidate comparison increment in a stakeholder-ready computational modeling portfolio. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare multiple plausible models with validation evidence and complexity costs.
Decompose an unfamiliar decision into linked algebraic, statistical, and computational submodels.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
